In this quick training video, Dean is going to continue the evolution of creating your small group, workshop or mastermind by helping you pick a name
for your event! By giving you a few examples of the names of masterminds he runs, your brain should start to churn our ideas on what your event will
be called or what your group will be called!
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Write down 3‐4 names you get excited about that could be the name of your small group, workshop or mastermind.
